name: Command
description: You speak a one-word command to a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or follow the command on its next turn. Choose the command from these options: Approach, Drop, Flee, Grovel (Prone), or Halt. Engine: a failed WIS save applies the Incapacitated condition until the end of the target's next turn — a faithful model of Halt / Grovel (the target loses its turn). The AIGM may narrate the other one-word commands (Approach, Drop, Flee).
scaling: You can affect one additional creature for each spell slot level above 1.
